title: poa sphondylodes var. kelungensis
intro: Poa sphondylodes var. kelungensis, also known as Kelung bent grass, is a type of grass plant native to Taiwan. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kelung bent grass include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems are dried and processed into teas, capsules, or powder for medicinal purposes.
